residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 346-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: Nitrilase-like catalytic triad mapping plus a ProteinGym AF2 structure-derived catalytic-site shell.
evidence: The active_site_neighborhood group is a +/-2 residue window around the curated Glu59/Lys134/Cys166 catalytic-site candidates. The structure_catalytic_shell_5a group was derived from data/proteingym/structures/AMIE_PSEAE.pdb using scripts/derive_residue_shell.py and includes residues with any heavy atom within 5.0 Angstrom of any curated catalytic residue heavy atom. The source record is data/proteingym/source_records/AMIE_PSEAE_catalytic_shell_5A.json.
